titleEn: US egg prices fall sharply as flock rebuilds after HPAI losses
titleZh: 美国鸡蛋价格因禽流感后鸡群重建大幅下跌
summaryZh: 美国鸡蛋零售价在2026年4月降至每打2.25美元，同比下跌62%，主要原因是禽流感后蛋鸡群重建，产量同比增长5.6%。但种鸡存栏量下降预示扩张放缓，USDA下调了后续产量和价格预期。该新闻反映了禽业市场供需动态，但对智慧畜牧技术（如IoT、AI）的直接关联度较低。
featuredReason: 该新闻提供了美国禽业市场的最新供需数据，有助于智慧畜牧从业者了解行业宏观背景，但缺乏直接的技术应用案例，对IoT/AI等智慧化方案的参考价值有限。
contentFull: Markets & policy Market trends US egg prices fall sharply as flock rebuilds after HPAI losses USDA cuts 2026 outlook on hatching flock slowdown 17 June 2026 1 minute read By: Global Ag Media North America The average US retail price for a dozen eggs fell to $2.25 in April 2026, down 10 cents from March and 62% below year-ago levels, according to the USDA's May 2026 Livestock, Dairy, and Poultry Outlook.Table egg production in March 2026 totalled 659.4 million dozen, up 5.6% year over year, driven primarily by a 6.1% higher average layer inventory. The lay rate was 82.3 eggs per 100 layers per day, down 0.5% from March 2025. First-quarter production totalled 1,912 million dozen, up 4.2% year over year.The table-egg layer flock has been rebuilding after losing 151.2 million birds to highly pathogenic avian influenza (HPAI) between February 2022 and April 2026, with inventories running above year-ago levels for the first four months of 2026. The egg-type hatching-egg layer flock, which supplies hens for the table-egg layer flock, has also been expanding since July 2025.However, USDA's National Agricultural Statistics Service reported the inventory of egg-type hatching layers at 4.079 million on April 1, down 765,000 month over month, signalling a slowdown in flock expansion.As a result, the USDA revised its quarterly production projections downward. The new estimates are 1,940 million dozen in the second quarter, 1,975 million dozen in the third quarter and 2,000 million dozen in the fourth quarter, for a 2026 total of 7,827 million dozen, up 4.4% from 2025. That is below last month's projected growth rate of 5.4%. For 2027, production is projected at 8,020 million dozen, up 2.5% from the 2026 projection.On the price side, New York wholesale prices for a dozen large eggs averaged 68.1 cents in April, down 87 cents from March and 306 cents below April 2025. The USDA lowered its second-quarter average price projection to 65 cents per dozen and its third-quarter projection to 80 cents, with the fourth-quarter projection unchanged at 120 cents. The revised 2026 annual average is 97.6 cents per dozen. The 2027 wholesale price is projected at 110 cents per dozen, up year over year. translationZh:
根据美国农业部2026年5月发布的《牲畜、乳制品和家禽展望》，2026年4月美国一打鸡蛋的平均零售价格降至2.25美元，比3月份下跌10美分，比去年同期水平低62%。

2026年3月的食用蛋产量总计6.594亿打，同比增长5.6%，主要原因是平均蛋鸡存栏量增加了6.1%。产蛋率为每100只蛋鸡日产82.3枚，比2025年3月下降0.5%。第一季度总产量为19.12亿打，同比增长4.2%。

在2022年2月至2026年4月期间，因高致病性禽流感（HPAI）损失了1.512亿只蛋鸡后，食用蛋鸡群正在重建，2026年前四个月的存栏量均高于去年同期水平。为食用蛋鸡群提供母鸡的蛋用种鸡群自2025年7月以来也在扩大。

然而，美国农业部国家农业统计局报告称，4月1日蛋用种鸡存栏量为407.9万只，环比减少76.5万只，表明鸡群扩张速度放缓。

因此，美国农业部下调了季度产量预测。新的预估值为：第二季度19.4亿打，第三季度19.75亿打，第四季度20亿打，2026年全年总计78.27亿打，比2025年增长4.4%。这低于上月预测的5.4%增长率。2027年产量预计为80.2亿打，比2026年预测值增长2.5%。

在价格方面，4月份纽约大号鸡蛋批发均价为每打68.1美分，比3月份下跌87美分，比2025年4月下跌306美分。美国农业部将第二季度平均价格预测下调至每打65美分，第三季度预测下调至80美分，第四季度预测维持在120美分不变。修订后的2026年全年均价为每打97.6美分。2027年批发价格预计为每打110美分，同比上涨。
contentHtml:
US egg prices fall sharply as flock rebuilds after HPAI losses 
USDA cuts 2026 outlook on hatching flock slowdown
